name: DeepSeek-OCR-Dashboard
desc: An out-of-the-box local Web UI for DeepSeek-OCR. Built with FastAPI + Vue.js, it supports PDF/Image uploads, progress tracking, and result visualization with b…
descFull: An out-of-the-box local Web UI for DeepSeek-OCR. Built with FastAPI + Vue.js, it supports PDF/Image uploads, progress tracking, and result   visualization with bounding boxes. Easily experience the power of a top-tier OCR model.
